calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maureen McFadden for petitioner and proposed administrator Timothy Breen (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed.

Ms. McFadden reported that there were no objections to the petition and stated that petitioner did not object to posting bond.

There being no objections, the Court admitted the will dated April 13, 2005 to probate. The Court appointed Timothy P. Breen as administrator with will annexed, with full Independent Administration of Estates Act authority. Bond was set in the amount of $20,000. The Court appointed Frank Mahoney III as probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for July 19, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Jan-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
